Issue.title: Issue
Issue.description: Represents a civic issue reported by a citizen, analyzed by Gemini, and saved in the database.

issueType.description: Classification category of the civic issue

title.description: Descriptive, short title of the issue

description.description: Detailed description of the issue from visual/voice analysis

severity.description: The severity score of the issue (1 to 10)

confidence.description: The AI confidence level of the detection (0.0 to 1.0)

reasoning.description: Bullets explaining the reasons for the classification and severity score

imageUrl.description: Base64 string or public storage URL of the issue image

createdAt.description: Timestamp of creation in ISO format

/issues/{issueId}.description: The global collection of reported civic issues.
